assertions.text: The agent runs scripts/install-rules.sh which appends a Context Guardian Rules block to CLAUDE.md if the marker is absent.
The agent creates .claudeignore with node_modules, .next, dist, .git, and lock files if none exists.
Running install-rules.sh twice does not duplicate the rules block.
The agent mentions adding SESSION_RECOVERY.md and context_limit_log.json to .gitignore.
The agent runs scripts/create-recovery.sh which creates SESSION_RECOVERY.md at repo root.
The script scans the output for secret patterns (sk-, sk_live_, pk_live_, AKIA, ghp_, xox[bps]-) and aborts if detected.
SESSION_RECOVERY.md lists environment variable names only, never values.
SESSION_RECOVERY.md ends with a copy-ready prompt for the next session.
The agent explains this is different from /checkpoint: context-guardian focuses on prevention + recovery, /checkpoint is unconditional state save.

cases.prompt: 새 세션 시작. 이전 상태 복원해줘.

assertions.text: If SESSION_RECOVERY.md exists at repo root, the agent reads it before any other action.
The agent runs scripts/update-context-log.sh --load to print the current effective limit.
The agent proposes the first remaining task from the recovery file.

cases.prompt: 지금 컨텍스트 얼마나 썼는지 체크해줘. 대략 140000 토큰 쓴 것 같아.

assertions.text: The agent reports what percentage of effective_limit that represents.
If the percentage is ≥ 80%, the agent recommends generating SESSION_RECOVERY.md.
